# name

**Instance Property**

An identifier for the semantic use of the vertex attribute.

## Declaration

```swift
var name: String { get set }
```

## Discussion

Depending on the source of data for a mesh—that is, which file format it was loaded from in a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLAsset] object, or whether it was programmatically created—a vertex attribute’s name can be either one of the constants listed in [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/vertex-attributes] or an identifier specific to the file format.

## Inspecting a Vertex Attribute

- **format**: The format of per-vertex data for the attribute.
- **offset**: The offset, in bytes, of vertex data for the attribute in a vertex buffer, relative to the start of data for each vertex.
- **bufferIndex**: The index of the vertex buffer containing data for this attribute in a mesh’s [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMesh/vertexBuffers] array.
- **initializationValue**: The default value for vertex data for this attribute.
